---
name: New failure (blind spot)
about: A place the standard itself is known to misfire. Kept forever.
title: "[failure] "
labels: failure
---

> failures/ documents where the SYSTEM gets it wrong — a detector that's structurally blind, an
> abstain that fires wrong, a subtype nothing catches. Distinct from a rejected human edit.

- **Class:** detection gap | judge failure mode | uncovered subtype
- **Status:** open

## What it is
<1–3 sentences.>

## Real example
<A concrete case. If it's in the gold set, give the id and the gold label.>

## Why it's hard
<What signal is missing / why current detectors can't see it.>

## What must NOT be done about it
<e.g. "don't fix the lexical detector by flagging more — that breaks the gate.">
